title: Shri Swaminathan Janakiraman re-appointed as RBI Deputy Governor
description: The Central Government has re-appointed Shri Swaminathan Janakiraman as Deputy Governor, Reserve Bank of India for a period of two years with effect from June 26, 2026, or until further orders, whichever is earlier. (Brij Raj)            Chief General Manager Press Release: 2026-2027/402
